nasb.text: They surrounded me, yes, they surrounded me; In the name of the Lord I will surely cut them off.

esv.text: They surrounded me, surrounded me on every side; in the name of the Lord I cut them off!

cnv.text: 他們圍繞著我，把我圍困， 我靠著耶和華的名必除滅他們。

ccb.text: 他们四面围住我， 但我靠着耶和华消灭了他们。

csbs.text: 他们围绕我，是的，他们围绕我； 我靠耶和华的名必要割除他们！
